title: Implement Auto-Registration
description: Add automatic tool registration using inventory or linkme crate so tools register themselves at compile time without manual edits to register_all()
acceptance_criteria: Tools register themselves at compile time
No manual edits to register_all() needed for new tools
register_all() discovers all ToolSpec definitions automatically
Works on all target platforms (macOS, Linux, Windows)
All existing tests continue to pass

subtasks.title: Evaluate inventory vs linkme crates
subtasks.description: Compare the two crates for auto-registration capability, platform support, and ergonomics

cons: Requires specific linker setup on some platforms

acceptance_criteria: Document which crate is selected and why
Verify selected crate works on macOS, Linux, Windows

subtasks.title: Add selected crate dependency
subtasks.description: Add inventory or linkme to Cargo.toml with appropriate version
acceptance_criteria: Crate added to dependencies
Project compiles successfully

subtasks.title: Create registration infrastructure
subtasks.description: Create the macro or trait that submits ToolSpec instances to global registry
implementation_notes: If using linkme: #[distributed_slice(TOOLS)] static TOOL: ToolSpec = ...
May need to wrap in a newtype for trait coherence
acceptance_criteria: Registration macro/attribute created
Works with existing define_tool! macro
Compile-time registration verified

subtasks.title: Update register_all() function
subtasks.description: Modify register_all() to iterate over collected specs instead of manual registration
acceptance_criteria: register_all() uses auto-discovered specs
All 42 tools still accessible via registry
No manual registration lines needed for migrated tools

subtasks.title: Update define_tool! macro for auto-registration
subtasks.description: Extend define_tool! macro to automatically submit the created ToolSpec to the registry
acceptance_criteria: define_tool! automatically registers the tool
No additional code needed in tool files
Backward compatible with existing tool definitions

subtasks.title: Test auto-registration
subtasks.description: Add tests verifying auto-registration works correctly
acceptance_criteria: Test that migrated tools appear in registry
Test that get_tool() works for auto-registered tools
Test on CI for all platforms

risks.mitigation: Test on all platforms before committing, have fallback to manual registration
Use lazy initialization patterns, test thoroughly
